title: Behike Operating System
description: You have ideas, tabs, half-started projects, and no system connecting any of it. The Behike OS maps your entire operation on one structured canvas.
modules: Brand Identity: voice, visual direction, naming
Product Engine: offers, pricing, launch checklist
Marketing & Sales: funnel, ads, email sequences
Content System: calendar, repurposing, platform strategy

title: Solopreneur Starter Blueprint
description: The free entry point. Core framework for starting a digital business from zero. No fluff, just the system.

title: E-Commerce Business Blueprint
description: Every decision your store needs, structured on one canvas. From store setup to scaling past six figures.
modules: Store Setup: platform, niche, target customer
Marketing Channels: paid, organic, email, influencer
Growth Phases: first sale to six figures
Revenue Tracker: P&L, ad spend, margins

title: Freelancer to Agency Blueprint
description: Stop trading hours for dollars. This maps the path from solo freelancer to agency owner with pricing, delivery, and hiring built in.
modules: Revenue Targets: income goals, capacity calculator
Weekly Schedule: time blocking, biz dev

title: Content Creator Blueprint
description: Posting without a system is not a strategy. Structure your entire content business so every piece connects to income.
modules: Platform Strategy: primary vs secondary, cross-posting
Content Formula: hooks, formats, batch production
Monetization Ladder: free to paid pipeline

title: Micro-SaaS Blueprint
description: Build a small, profitable SaaS product as a solo founder. From idea validation to recurring revenue.
modules: Idea Validation: market research, demand testing
MVP Scope: feature prioritization, build timeline
Pricing Model: freemium vs paid, tier design
Launch Strategy: beta, waitlist, product hunt

title: YouTube Channel Blueprint
description: Launch and grow a YouTube channel from zero to monetization. Algorithm strategy, content systems, revenue diversification.
modules: Production System: batch filming, editing workflow
Algorithm: watch time, CTR, retention tactics

title: AI Agency Blueprint
description: Start an AI automation agency. Land clients, build workflows, deliver results. The complete agency-in-a-box system.

title: Dropshipping Blueprint
description: Start dropshipping with zero inventory. Product research, supplier vetting, listing optimization, and scaling.
modules: Product Research: trend analysis, margin calculator
Supplier Vetting: reliability scores, backup sources
Order Automation: tools, tracking, customer comms

title: Newsletter Business Blueprint
description: Build a newsletter that makes money. Growth, monetization, automation. From first subscriber to paid sponsorships.
modules: Newsletter Setup: platform, brand, welcome sequence
Content Framework: topics, formats, writing system
Growth Engine: lead magnets, referrals, cross-promos
Monetization: sponsors, paid tier, product pipeline

title: Coaching Business Blueprint
description: Turn expertise into a coaching business. Pricing, delivery, client acquisition, and scaling mapped on one canvas.

title: Podcast Business Blueprint
description: Launch a podcast that builds authority and revenue. Equipment, format, distribution, and monetization.
modules: Content Planning: episode structure, guest strategy

title: Etsy Seller Blueprint
description: Open an Etsy shop that sells. Product research, SEO, listing optimization, and scaling to full-time income.
modules: Photography: mockups, lifestyle shots, A/B testing
Scaling: ads, seasonal strategy, product expansion

title: Consulting Business Blueprint
description: Start a consulting business with your existing expertise. Positioning, pricing, proposals, and client delivery.
modules: Pricing: project vs retainer, rate calculator

title: Crypto Investor Blueprint
description: A structured system for crypto investing. Research framework, portfolio allocation, risk management, and exit strategies.
modules: Portfolio Allocation: risk tiers, position sizing
Entry Strategy: DCA, technical triggers, catalysts
Risk Management: stop losses, hedging, diversification
Exit Strategy: profit targets, rebalancing schedule
